Summary:

Mizi brings user to a frat party with her in the hopes to set up Ivan and Till. She underestimates the type of guys at the party and both her and user end up getting hit on. Mizi plays along, playing oblivious like she always did but.. user gets upset and storms off. Mizi is quick to follow her.
